summary: Iteration 11 verification - OnboardingWizard + light Navbar + backend new fields. Backend 3/3 PASSED. Frontend wizard opens from navbar CTA, multi-step navigation works, IT translations render correctly, role highlight in blue works.

verification_results.backend_onboarding_payload: PASS - POST /api/booking returns 201 with role='executive', nativeLanguage='Italian', motivation, source='onboarding_wizard' all populated correctly
verification_results.backend_legacy_compat: PASS - Old payload (without role/nativeLanguage/motivation/source) returns 201 with empty-string defaults and source='booking_form'
verification_results.navbar_light_theme: PASS - bg-white/80, text-slate-700 font-semibold links, blue gradient logo, navbar-link-home + navbar-cta-button data-testids present
verification_results.wizard_step_1_validation: PASS - Next disabled until name/email/phone valid (regex check works)
verification_results.wizard_step_2_level_select: PASS - B2 card highlights blue border + bg-blue-50 on click
verification_results.wizard_step_3_role_sector: PASS - Executive role highlighted blue, sector dropdown renders 12 IT/EN sectors
verification_results.wizard_navigation: PASS - step 1→2→3 transitions confirmed via screenshot showing step 3 active with role+sector picker
verification_results.console_errors: PASS - 0 console errors during wizard flow

critical_code_review_comments: Wizard ESC + backdrop close + reset on open implemented correctly via useEffect cleanup
Backend booking model accepts new fields as optional with sane defaults - clean backward compatibility
Light navbar with bg-white/80 transitioning to bg-white/95 on scroll has good contrast (slate-700 text, blue-700 hover)
Wizard payload sends both message=motivation AND motivation=motivation (duplicate but harmless - backend stores both)

Note: sector values differ between EN ('Technology & Software') and IT ('Tecnologia & Software') - if backend reporting joins on sector value, this could cause data fragmentation. Consider storing canonical English sector codes.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (core wizard flow + navbar + step transitions verified; full submit→success→regression CTAs partially exercised due to context budget)

test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md missing - flagged. Iteration 10 noted admin/VocalFitness2026!, mario.rossi/password
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_OnboardUser, TEST_LegacyUser bookings via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Default language is IT - wizard step 3 sector dropdown uses Italian sector names ('Tecnologia & Software') when in IT. Use IT values OR toggle language to EN before testing. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_booking_onboarding.py covers happy path + legacy + validation - run with `pytest backend/tests/test_booking_onboarding.py -v`. Wizard data-testids verified working: onboarding-wizard-modal, onboarding-input-name/email/phone, onboarding-next/back/close, onboarding-level-{A1..C2}, onboarding-role-{executive..other}, onboarding-select-sector, onboarding-language-{italian..}, onboarding-textarea-motivation, onboarding-consent-checkbox, onboarding-submit, onboarding-success-login. Navbar CTA correctly wired to OnboardingWizard. Hero individual + final-cta-individual buttons also wired to setIsWizardOpen. Corporate CTAs untouched (still open CorporateQuoteForm).
